title: Slope and pavement stability monitoring with ground motion
summary: Ground motion time series reveal slow movement under roads and embankments before failure.
problem: Roads crossing unstable geology can experience slow slope movement and subsidence that is invisible at the surface until failure occurs. Point-based sensors leave most of a corridor unmonitored.
solution: EGMS displacement time series from ascending and descending Sentinel-1 orbits can be combined to map 2D ground motion across an entire road corridor. Persistent-movement sectors are flagged for geotechnical investigation and proactive remediation.

copernicusRole.detail: EGMS 2D-decomposed ground motion is used as delivered to flag moving sectors, with light analysis to prioritise geotechnical investigation.
